theme_strategy: Dark and Light Mode. Default to Dark. OLED black (#000000) background for dark mode to save battery and look premium (Linear/Notion inspired).

components_guidelines.cards: Cardless/Linear style: Flat backgrounds. Light mode uses #FFFFFF with 1px #EAEAEA border. Dark mode uses #121212 with 1px #2D2D2D border. No box-shadows. Internal padding 16px.
components_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons: Pill shape (rounded-full), solid #E54D2E background, white text. Secondary buttons: 1px border, transparent background. Active opacity 0.8.
components_guidelines.inputs: Flat surfaces, no visible borders until focus. Focus state triggers 1px border of primary color.
components_guidelines.bottom_nav: Frosted glass style if possible, otherwise solid background with top border. Active icon uses primary color, inactive uses muted text color.
components_guidelines.pomodoro_timer: Large central fluid typography countdown. Circular progress ring using SVG. Play/Pause rounded buttons below.

splash.description: Centered logo and 'StudyFlow AI' text. Clean, minimalist fade transition.

login.description: Full-screen background image with a dark gradient overlay at the bottom. Clean authentication options.
elements: Google Sign-in Button (White/Dark based on theme)

home.description: Dashboard overview providing immediate value and focus.
elements: Quick Stats Row (2 columns: Hours Studied, Tasks Left)
Up Next List (Horizontal scroll of upcoming classes/exams)

analytics.description: Progress tracking and exam prep metrics.

calendar.description: Monthly overview of exams, assignments, and tasks.

image_urls.description: Minimalist white workspace, clean aesthetic study setup for login background
Clean desk setup to use sparingly as card backgrounds or empty states

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, StyleSheet).
Implement the theme toggling logic using a Context provider (React.createContext).
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Avoid using Shadows to simulate depth; rely on background color contrasts and 1px borders (Linear/Notion design pattern).
Ensure at least 44pt height for all touchable elements to meet accessibility standards.
